coreJobStatement: Install, commission, and maintain plumbing, heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning systems in buildings to deliver thermal comfort, indoor air quality, potable water, and sanitary drainage [SRC: VN_plumbing_heating_and_air_conditioning_co]
lPath: L7 > L6.5 Testing & Commissioning > L5.5.2 Hydraulic Balancing & Flow Measurement > L4.5.2.1 Ultrasonic Inline Flow Sensor

segments.name: Residential new-build hydronic
segments.characteristics: New home with radiant floor / baseboard heating requiring first-time commissioning
segments.circumstance: New home with radiant floor / baseboard heating requiring first-time commissioning

segments.name: Residential heat-pump retrofit
segments.characteristics: Existing home switching from gas to heat pump, requiring hydronic rebalancing
segments.circumstance: Existing home switching from gas to heat pump, requiring hydronic rebalancing

segments.name: Commercial new-construction HVAC
segments.characteristics: New commercial building with zoned hydronic heating/cooling requiring code-compliant commissioning
segments.circumstance: New commercial building with zoned hydronic heating/cooling requiring code-compliant commissioning

segments.name: Commercial retrofit / energy upgrade
segments.characteristics: Existing commercial building replacing generator or upgrading for energy performance certification
segments.circumstance: Existing commercial building replacing generator or upgrading for energy performance certification

segments.name: Ongoing service / preventive maintenance
segments.characteristics: Operating building requiring periodic flow-performance verification and fault diagnosis
segments.circumstance: Operating building requiring periodic flow-performance verification and fault diagnosis

alternatives.name: Hydronic Manometer / dP Meter via Balancing Valve

jobSteps.description: the required hydronic flow rates per zone from load calculations and equipment specs
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Sensor must be matched to pipe size, flow range, medium type
jobSteps.rawStatement: Define the required hydronic flow rates per zone from load calculations and equipment specs
jobSteps.rationale: Sensor must be matched to pipe size, flow range, medium type

jobSteps.description: Install the flow measurement device, establish pipe connections, configure communication protocol
jobSteps.rawStatement: Install the flow measurement device, establish pipe connections, configure communication protocol

jobSteps.description: the measurement system is operational and producing valid readings before commissioning
jobSteps.rawStatement: Confirm the measurement system is operational and producing valid readings before commissioning

jobSteps.description: Measure actual flow rates per zone and compare against design specifications
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: This IS the sensor's core function
jobSteps.rawStatement: Measure actual flow rates per zone and compare against design specifications
jobSteps.rationale: This IS the sensor's core function

jobSteps.description: flow stability, detect drift, anomalies, or degradation during and after commissioning
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Continuous monitoring is the key permanent-sensor differentiator
jobSteps.rawStatement: Monitor flow stability, detect drift, anomalies, or degradation during and after commissioning
jobSteps.rationale: Continuous monitoring is the key permanent-sensor differentiator

jobSteps.description: Adjust balancing valves based on measured flow deviations, re-verify after adjustment
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Sensor provides the real-time feedback loop for adjustment
jobSteps.rawStatement: Adjust balancing valves based on measured flow deviations, re-verify after adjustment
jobSteps.rationale: Sensor provides the real-time feedback loop for adjustment

jobSteps.description: Document measured flow rates, generate commissioning report, verify all zones within tolerance
jobSteps.rawStatement: Document measured flow rates, generate commissioning report, verify all zones within tolerance
